hero.tagline: Fine Jewelry in the Heart of Skopje
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted pieces that tell your story

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Biser Gold — Crafting Beauty Since 2000
about.text1: Nestled in the heart of Skopje, North Macedonia, Biser Gold is a testament to timeless craftsmanship and refined elegance. Each piece in our collection is thoughtfully designed to celebrate life's most precious moments.
about.text2: From delicate gold necklaces to statement rings, our artisans pour passion and precision into every creation — making jewelry that becomes part of your story.

collections.title: Our Collections
collections.subtitle: Discover pieces crafted with passion
collections.inquiry_text: Did you see a piece somewhere and wonder if we have it — or can find it? Send us a photo or description and we'll do our best.
